# Crypto Beginner

Crypto Beginner is a free educational platform to learn Bitcoin, Cryptocurrency, Blockchain, Web3, Wallets, DeFi and Digital Assets.

## Main Website

- [Home](https://cryptobeginner.in/)
- [Learn](https://cryptobeginner.in/learn)
- [Blog](https://cryptobeginner.in/blog)
- [Dictionary](https://cryptobeginner.in/dictionary)
- [About](https://cryptobeginner.in/about)
- [Contact](https://cryptobeginner.in/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://cryptobeginner.in/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://cryptobeginner.in/terms)
- [Sitemap](https://cryptobeginner.in/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://cryptobeginner.in/robots.txt)

## Purpose

Crypto Beginner helps beginners understand:

- Bitcoin
- Cryptocurrency
- Blockchain
- Wallets
- Web3
- DeFi
- Stablecoins
- NFTs
- Crypto Security
- Trading Basics
